title: AXMaxLengthValidationRule
description: Validation rule class that ensures a string value does not exceed a maximum length requirement.

types.title: AXMaxLengthValidationRule

props.name: options
props.description: Configuration options for the maximum length validation rule.

types.description: Validation rule that checks if a string value does not exceed the specified maximum length.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates that the string length is less than or equal to the maximum length.

methods.name: validateAsync
methods.description: Asynchronously validates that the string length is less than or equal to the maximum length.

methods.name: setMaxLength
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed length for validation.

methods.name: getMaxLength
methods.description: Returns the current maximum length limit.
